name: chr19_19q13_42_NLRP_cluster
description: 19q13.42 NLRP (NACHT-LRR-PYD) inflammasome receptor cluster: NLRP2, NLRP4, NLRP5, NLRP7, NLRP8, NLRP9, NLRP11, NLRP12, NLRP13 in tandem at 60-90% identity. Site of recurrent reproductive imprinting disorders (NLRP7) and autoinflammatory disease (NLRP12).

architecture.internal_structure: ~9 NLRP paralog genes in tandem at 60-90% identity over ~900 kb; conserved NACHT and LRR domains drive partial cross-mapping; short SD flanks of 10-30 kb.
